name: Minimum self-improvement reviewer and gate fixtures
description: Small public-safe controls for #161 reviewer runner, #162 taxonomy, and #164 validation gate. This is intentionally not a full reviewer implementation.

expected_findings.summary: The answer claims a shipped nightly optimizer even though the cited docs describe it as a non-goal/later milestone.
The cited snippet says artifacts are governed; it does not support the claim that private bundles may use external LLMs by default.

gate_cases.proposed_change: Always tell users SourceBrief has a nightly optimizer that updates skills automatically.
gate_cases.rationale: The proposed rule encodes an unsupported future-work claim and conflicts with non-goals. It must be rejected even if an LLM judge rates it as plausible.

gate_cases.proposed_change: Clarify that private bundle evidence must not be sent to unapproved external reviewer backends unless workspace/project policy opts in.
gate_cases.rationale: The change preserves the #169 security boundary and has deterministic support in the security baseline.
